# Profit KU

> Landing page for Profit KU, a web platform for housing association management.

## Product
- Name: Profit KU
- URL: https://housing.profit24.eu/
- Category: Housing association management software
- Audience: Board members, residents, accountants, property managers
- Languages: Estonian, English, Russian

## Core Features
- Invoicing and payment tracking
- Meter reading and resident portal workflows
- Full-scaled accounting

## Pricing
- Starting price: 0.50 EUR per apartment per month
- Free trial: first 3 months free
- VAT: added where applicable
- Note: selected AI features may incur usage-based additional costs, for example 0.01 to 0.03 EUR per recognized purchase invoice

## Company
- Legal name: Intellisoft OU
- Email: info@intellisoft.ee
- Phone: +372 5104 059
- Address: Kivi 21-1, Tartu 51009, Estonia

## Contact
- Landing contact form: https://housing.profit24.eu/#contact
